_comment: Smoke-test fixture for chemistry CLI wiring. Simulated values intentionally match measured values so the end-to-end path should pass before solver integration is connected.

provenance.source: UConn Combustion Diagnostics Lab Experimental Database (RCM) + UConn Laminar Flame Speed Database compilation + TNF Sandia Piloted Flame documentation
provenance.pdf_url: https://combdiaglab.engr.uconn.edu/expdb/hydrocarbons/iso-octane (RCM ignition delay table); https://combdiaglab.engr.uconn.edu/database/laminar-flame-speed-database/transportation-relevant-hydrocarbons/ (flame speed compilation download); https://tnfworkshop.org/wp-content/uploads/2019/02/SandiaPilotDoc21.pdf (pilot composition)
provenance.doi: N/A (database/compilation sources; original paper DOI not embedded in template extraction)

operating_bounds.notes: Ignition delay points are from UConn RCM iC8 Davidson et al. mixture (1.08% iC8, 20.33% O2, 78.59% N2). Phi computed from mixture O2:fuel ratio (~0.664).

metrics.notes: Converted from reported mass fractions using molecular weights.
Value taken from UConn flame-speed compilation spreadsheet.

dataset.description: Iso-octane ignition delay (RCM) from UConn Combustion Diagnostics Lab experimental database (Davidson et al. dataset), plus laminar flame speed compilation and pilot-species composition from TNF Sandia flame documentation.

solver_config.notes: Smoke-test config using the LLNL detailed gasoline surrogate CHEMKIN source bundle. Replace simulated values with real solver outputs once Cantera integration is wired.

mechanism_provenance.note: Simulated values intentionally mirror measured targets
